Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: OTHER OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION's Motion For Leave To File Complaint-In-Intervention.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Old Republic General Insurance Corp.'s unopposed "motion for leave to file complaint-in-intervention" is granted.

Order signed.
